name: Advanced Flashcards WebAppServer
notes: 8.5.2 (build 55): File-based logging with rotation (server/error/user_activity logs persist across restarts); expandable admin stat tiles; Custom Set tab switching fix; AI generation no longer assumes foreign language context; deck-specific Short Answers mode; add-card deck pre-selects active deck; custom set counts reflect custom status; random card input layout fix.
